title: RJ Corp Healthcare launches Cocoon Hospital in Chandigarh for maternal and child care
summary: Facility will provide services across obstetrics, gynaecology, fertility, foetal medicine, neonatal intensive care, paediatrics and women's health
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Facility will provide services across obstetrics, gynaecology, fertility, foetal medicine, neonatal intensive care, paediatrics and women's health

RJ Corp Healthcare has announced the launch of Cocoon Hospital in Chandigarh, a mother and child healthcare facility focused on women, mothers, newborns and children.

According to the company, the launch comes as Chandigarh continues to expand its healthcare infrastructure through public and private sector investments. It stated that the hospital is intended to strengthen access to maternal and child healthcare for families across the region.

The company said Cocoon Hospitals has been developed around the philosophy of “Creating Lifelong Bonds” and is designed to support families through pregnancy planning, antenatal care, high-risk pregnancies, childbirth, neonatal intensive care, paediatrics and women’s wellness.

Commenting on the expansion, Ravi Kant Jaipuria, Founder and Chairman, RJ Corp Healthcare, said;

“At RJ Corp Healthcare, we believe that every mother deserves access to world-class healthcare and every child deserves the healthiest possible start to life. Cocoon Hospitals reflect our long-term commitment to building specialised healthcare institutions that combine medical excellence with compassion. Our expansion strategy is well underway, with upcoming advanced facilities in Lucknow and Guwahati, as we continue building a nationwide network of specialised maternal and child healthcare ecosystems.”

According to the company, healthcare requirements now extend beyond clinical outcomes, with families seeking specialised expertise, technology, personalised support and continuity of care. It stated that Cocoon Hospitals has been developed to provide care for mothers, newborns and children through clinical services.

Commenting on the vision for the Cocoon brand, Devyani Jaipuria, Vice Chairperson, Cocoon Hospitals, said;

“The birth of a child is one of life’s most precious milestones. Through Cocoon, we aspire to create an experience that goes beyond healthcare by building trust, emotional reassurance and lifelong relationships with every family we serve. Every family’s journey is unique, and so should be the care they receive. At Cocoon, our endeavour is to combine clinical excellence with empathy, ensuring families receive comprehensive support right from planning a pregnancy, through the pregnancy journey, childbirth and every stage of parenthood thereafter. Our vision is to build lasting relationships founded on trust, safety and compassionate care.”

According to the company, the hospital provides services across obstetrics, gynaecology, fertility, foetal medicine, neonatal intensive care, paediatrics and women’s health.

Commenting on the launch, Dr Alok Khullar, Group CEO, RJ Corp Healthcare, said;

“The launch comes at a time when maternal and neonatal healthcare in India is rapidly evolving. Rising high-risk pregnancies, changing lifestyles, delayed parenthood and growing awareness around neonatal care have significantly transformed the expectations of families. Today’s parents seek hospitals that not only provide advanced medical expertise but also seamless support, safety and reassurance throughout pregnancy and beyond.”

According to the company, the launch of Cocoon Hospital in Chandigarh is part of its plan to expand maternal and child healthcare services across India. It added that hospitals in Lucknow and Guwahati are also planned as part of the expansion.
